violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Observed food employees putting on gloves without washing their hands first. Hands should be washed before putting on gloves.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Inside of the ice machine was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood ventilation filters were found dirty. Filters should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. Cooked rice and chicken, prepared yesterday, were found above 41F in the walk-in cooler. Potentially hazardous foods should be maintained at 41F or below. ***Recommended discarding these items.
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Method, temperature and time (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
